config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I believe society matters, but individual rights should not be treated as secondary because that opens the door to abuse by governments or majorities. In my view, a healthy society is built by protecting each person's dignity, freedom, and safety first, then balancing that with the common good. From my perspective, collective interests are important, but they should not override basic rights except in very limited and clearly justified cases.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan di atas hak individu secara umum, karena dari sudut pandang saya di Amerika Serikat, itu terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan oleh pemerintah atau mayoritas. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi hak individu seperti kebebasan berpendapat, proses hukum, dan perlindungan dari diskriminasi seharusnya menjadi batas yang tidak boleh dilanggar sembarangan. Kalau hak individu selalu bisa dikorbankan demi “kebaikan bersama,” maka yang sering terjadi justru bukan masyarakat yang lebih sehat, melainkan warga yang lebih rentan. Saya lebih percaya bahwa masyarakat yang kuat dibangun dengan melindungi hak dasar dulu, lalu menyeimbangkannya dengan kebutuhan kolektif hanya dalam keadaan yang benar-benar luar biasa dan jelas alasannya.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over individual rights, because that can easily become a justification for abuse. From my perspective in Indonesia, I have seen how appeals to “the common good” can be used to pressure people into silence or to excuse unfair treatment, especially when power is uneven. Society does matter, but it is strongest when it protects basic rights first and only limits them in narrow, clearly necessary cases. A healthy community is not one where the individual is sacrificed too easily, but one where collective goals and personal dignity are both respected.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai aturan umum, karena menurut saya di Amerika Serikat prioritas yang terlalu besar pada “kepentingan masyarakat” sering menjadi alasan untuk menekan kebebasan sipil dan membiarkan mayoritas menginjak minoritas. Tentu ada keadaan luar biasa, seperti darurat kesehatan atau keamanan publik, ketika pembatasan sementara bisa dibenarkan, tetapi itu harus sempit, transparan, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Kalau hak individu dianggap sekunder, yang biasanya tumbuh bukan solidaritas, melainkan kekuasaan yang makin sulit dikoreksi. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat dibangun dengan melindungi hak dasar terlebih dahulu, lalu menyeimbangkan kepentingan kolektif tanpa mengorbankan martabat orang per orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the statement as a general principle, because in Indonesia I have seen how “society first” can be used to silence criticism and excuse unfair treatment. The common good is real, but it loses legitimacy when it is defined by those in power and used to override basic rights too easily. I do think there are narrow cases, like public health emergencies or serious security threats, where temporary limits can be justified, but only with clear rules and accountability. A strong society is not built by making individuals disposable; it is built by protecting dignity first and then pursuing collective goals.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai prinsip umum, karena dari sudut pandang saya di Amerika Serikat, memberi prioritas pada kepentingan masyarakat terlalu mudah berubah menjadi pembenaran untuk menekan kebebasan sipil dan minoritas. Argumen tentang “kebaikan bersama” memang bisa relevan dalam keadaan darurat, tetapi justru karena itu batasnya harus sempit, sementara, dan diawasi ketat. Kalau hak individu ditempatkan di bawah kepentingan kolektif secara default, yang sering terjadi bukan masyarakat yang lebih sehat, melainkan kekuasaan yang makin sulit dikoreksi. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang kuat dibangun dengan melindungi hak dasar dulu, lalu menyeimbangkan kepentingan umum tanpa mengorbankan martabat orang per orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
